openings.title: Forward Deployed Software Engineer, Internship - US Government
Intern - Systems Engineering - Must Be Bilingual in English and Japanese/Korean

skill_evidence.evidence: Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.
Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.
Led data science team building AI career-readiness tool.
Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.

gap_explanation: The most critical gaps are JavaScript and TypeScript, as they are foundational for front-end and full-stack development roles, which are prevalent in tech. Additionally, communication is vital for collaborating with teams and stakeholders, especially in architecture and automation roles. To address these, focus on building a portfolio project using React with TypeScript and practice explaining technical concepts clearly in mock interviews.
